name: Aries
delineation: bold opening move; the diff plants a flag and dares reviewers to keep up.

name: Taurus
delineation: load-bearing work laid brick by brick; slow, deliberate, hard to move once merged.

name: Gemini
delineation: a talkative diff full of small threads; expect many review comments and clarifying replies.

name: Cancer
delineation: protective, home-tending work; touches stateful surfaces and asks for careful review.

name: Leo
delineation: an author-forward change meant to be seen; a demoable feature or a headline refactor.

name: Virgo
delineation: meticulous tidying; small tweaks with outsized cumulative effect on the codebase's hygiene.

name: Libra
delineation: a diff seeking consensus; the author wants a co-signer more than a rubber stamp.

name: Scorpio
delineation: cuts into load-bearing internals; hidden implications lurk beneath the surface hunks.

name: Sagittarius
delineation: an ambitious arc that ranges wide; may overshoot scope but points the codebase somewhere new.

name: Capricorn
delineation: structural, gatekeeping work; the sort of change that ships a milestone or hardens a boundary.

name: Aquarius
delineation: unconventional rewiring; introduces a new abstraction or breaks a familiar pattern for a reason.

name: Pisces
delineation: soft, atmospheric changes; UX, copy, and edges — hard to measure, easy to feel.
